pages.raw_text:
Notice of application of the Mod
ern Irrigation & Land Company for
a franchise over the roads Of Spo-
kane county.


Notice is hereby given that the
Modern Irrigation & Land Company,
corporation. has applied to the
county commissioners of Spokane
of a franchise to 1t, it's successors,
and assigns. for the construction and
operation OF a single or double track
suburban or interurban railway over,
along and across the public roads,
highways and bridges In the districts
known as the Spokane Valley and
Liberty Lake. commencing on
Sprague street at the city limits and
along the county road to Liberty
Lake as more fully set forth and
described in the proposed franchise
and maps of said route to be filed
in the office of the county commits
sioners of Spokane county, Washing
ton. and that Tuesday. the 4th day
of April, 1905, at II o'clock a. m. at
the office of said county commission
ers In the county courthouse in the
city and county of Spokane. Wash
ington, has been fixed as the time
and place of the hearing for said ap-
plication for franchise, by order OF
the board of county commissioners
of Spokane county, Washington.


(Seal) z. STEWART.
County Auditor and eX-Oficio Clerk


of the Board of County Commits


sioners.


BY GEO. H WALLIS, Deputy.
